title: README operator one-time live orchestrator checklist post-LLM-closure refresh
problem: Tickets 223–225 closed staged rank-1 LLM inventory and documented deterministic reconcile/report, but README Operator Quickstart one-time orchestrator verification checklist may still imply broader live LLM scope than detect.
acceptance_criteria: README one-time live orchestrator verification checklist reflects closed rank-1 LLM inventory (extract/link/build/detect only; orchestrator mock LLM forced).
Checklist notes reconcile/report are deterministic and not part of per-step live Ollama proofs.
non_goals: New LLM tasks or fallthrough flags.
category: Phase 3 / live LLM / staged spine documentation
